THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRST SELECT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAGAT, ERLINDA P. $2,456.32 PRINCIPAL, $560.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $64.68 INTEREST, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,211.00, *IT IS FURTHER AGREED THAT DEFENDANT SHALL PAY THE SUM OF $100.00 PER MONTH COMMENCING APRIL 22, 2000 UNTIL THE JUDG- MENT IS PAID IN FULL* NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
